column2: The teacher asked Peter not to be late.
The guard ordered to turn back.

column1: George, "Don't speak over the phone when I'm listening to music, Betty."

column2: George asked Betty not to speak over the phone when he was listening to music.
The guide asked to mind the step.
Mother asked children not to eat so many cakes.
Peter asked Ann to wait for him.

column1: The teacher, "Don't forget to take your textbook, Jim."

column2: The teacher asked Jim not to forget to take his textbook.
Mum asked Kate to remember to post the letter.
Sue asked not to leave the door open.
The officer ordered to open the fire.
